test.notes: swell-core tests pass (170 tests). Full workspace tests timed out at 60s but crate-level tests pass.

lint.notes: Fixed formatting in cost_tracking.rs, opentelemetry.rs, events.rs, main.rs, anthropic.rs, openai.rs, knowledge_graph.rs, state_machine.rs, mcp.rs before final check

blockingIssuesResolved.blockingIssue: DashboardState::update_cost() is never called anywhere at runtime
blockingIssuesResolved.resolution: LLM backends now call record_llm_cost() after successful chat() calls. DashboardState::sync_cost_from_global() polls the global tracker every 5 seconds.

blockingIssuesResolved.blockingIssue: DashboardState::register_agent() is never called anywhere at runtime
blockingIssuesResolved.resolution: main.rs spawns a task that subscribes to OrchestratorEvent::AgentRegistered and forwards to register_agent().

blockingIssuesResolved.blockingIssue: DashboardState::broadcast_event() is never called anywhere at runtime
blockingIssuesResolved.resolution: EventEmitter::subscribe() enables real-time event broadcasting. main.rs spawns a task that converts DaemonEvent → DashboardEvent and calls broadcast_event().

blockingIssuesResolved.blockingIssue: OtelConfig struct defines otlp_endpoint field but is never instantiated or used
blockingIssuesResolved.resolution: OtelConfig::from_env() is called at daemon startup in main.rs:17 and passed to init_tracer_provider().

blockingIssuesResolved.blockingIssue: GenAiSpanBuilder::start_span is marked #[allow(dead_code)] and is never called
blockingIssuesResolved.resolution: Both anthropic.rs:204-228 and openai.rs:253-274 now create spans using tracer.span_builder() and tracer.build() with full GenAI attributes.

blockingIssuesResolved.blockingIssue: No actual span creation during LLM calls
blockingIssuesResolved.resolution: LLM backends now create spans with gen_ai.* attributes (operation.name, provider.name, request.model, usage.input_tokens, usage.output_tokens, response.model, latency_ms, cost.usd).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add global tracker patterns using LazyLock + RwLock. The cost_tracking.rs implementation uses static GLOBAL_LLM_COST_TRACKER: LazyLock<std::sync::RwLock<GlobalLlmCostData>> which is a useful pattern for thread-safe global state that isn't documented in the Rust skill.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: obs-cost-breakdown: 'The Rust skill does not cover global tracker patterns using LazyLock + RwLock'
